problem: Review and refine HD_ONTOLOGY_complete.json for accuracy, completeness, and consistency with codebase patterns and 64keys terminology
goal: Produce validated, refined HD_ONTOLOGY_complete.json with verified accuracy, complete coverage, consistent terminology, and alignment with existing codebase (bodygraph.yaml, channels.yaml, centers.yaml, core.py)

current_ontology.coverage: 5 Types, 7 Authorities, 12 Profiles, 36 Channels, 9 Centers, 64 Gates, 4 Quarters

data_integrity: All 64 gates present with correct names and I Ching references
All 36 channels match channels.yaml exactly (gate pairs)
All 9 centers match centers.yaml exactly (gate assignments)
Center names use 64keys terminology (LIFEFORCE not Sacral, DRIVE not Root)
completeness: Each Type includes: name, traditional_name, description, strategy, not_self_theme, percentage
Each Authority includes: name, description, decision_strategy, hierarchy_order
Each Profile includes: notation (e.g., 3/5), lines (conscious/unconscious), description, archetype
Each Channel includes: id, name, gate_a, gate_b, center_a, center_b, circuit, theme
Each Center includes: name, traditional_name, gates[], defined_description, undefined_description
Each Gate includes: number, name, i_ching_name, center, theme, keywords
consistency_checks: Channel gate pairs match both directions (if channel 1-8, verify both gates reference channel)
Channel center assignments derived from gate-to-center mappings
Circuit assignments for channels are correct (Integration/Knowing/Sensing)
Profile line combinations are all valid (12 profiles exactly)
terminology_validation: Traditional HD terminology in traditional_name fields only
Center names: EXPRESSION (Throat), MIND (Ajna), IDENTITY (G-Center), WILLPOWER (Heart), LIFEFORCE (Sacral), EMOTION (Solar Plexus), INTUITION (Spleen), DRIVE (Root), INSPIRATION (Head)
Type names: Initiator (not Manifestor), Builder (not Generator), Specialist (not ManGen), Coordinator (not Projector), Observer (not Reflector)

existing_codebase_validation.validation_approach: Cross-reference ontology data with YAML files - every gate number, channel pair, center name must match exactly

constraints: Work in strand fork space (automatic isolation branch)
Do NOT change 64keys terminology - it is primary
Validate against existing YAML files - they are source of truth for gates/channels/centers
Fix any errors or inconsistencies found
Document all changes made in refinement report
success_criteria: Traditional HD terminology present in traditional_name fields
No missing data in any ontology entity

1_comprehensive_validation.description: Validate ontology against existing codebase and HD standards

tasks.task: Validate HD_ONTOLOGY_complete.json comprehensively: (1) Cross-check all gates against bodygraph.yaml, (2) Cross-check all channels against channels.yaml, (3) Cross-check all centers against centers.yaml, (4) Validate 64keys terminology usage, (5) Check for missing data, (6) Verify all cross-references. Document all discrepancies found.

Audit ontology data integrity: (1) Verify completeness of all entities, (2) Check consistency of cross-references, (3) Validate terminology usage, (4) Identify any errors or omissions, (5) Assess quality and usability. Provide confidence score and evidence.

3_refinement_synthesis.description: Synthesize findings and produce refined ontology

tasks.task: Synthesize validation findings and produce refined ontology: (1) Review all validation findings, (2) Fix identified errors, (3) Fill missing data, (4) Ensure consistency, (5) Apply corrections, (6) Generate refined HD_ONTOLOGY_complete.json. Document all changes in refinement report.

semantic: All 36 channel gate pairs match channels.yaml
All 12 Profiles present with correct line combinations
completeness: No missing fields in any entity

metadata.isolation: automatic git fork and branch creation
